description: 129 - 13-03-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Andrew Mitchell (HM Ambassador to Germany, FCDO) and others
text:
to Germany, FCDO) and others

From: Andrew Mitchell Personal

Sent: Thur 13/03/2025 9:02:30 PM (UTC)

To: Peter Mandelson|Personal

Subject: Re: 250312 Letter: EU/UK Defence Initiatives and Relationship:  ***

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

RK

Will do, Peter.

I’m writing something ont
you.

Andrew

Andrew Mitchell CMG

HM Ambassador to Germany
Personal

that is planned to pass by your team: I’ll send to

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: Thursday, March 13, 2025 20:40
To: Andrew Mitchell
Subject: Re: 250312 Letter: EU/UK Defence Initiatives and Relationship:

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY

KK

Andrew, as I hope you could tell I am very interested wee

Please include me in all your reporting.
Peter

Subject: 250312 Letter: EU/UK Defence Initiatives and Relationship: 
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HMG ONLY
Dear Michael,
Please see attached a letter covering the latest EU defence initiatives and the UK-EU 
relationship on defence.
Best,
Lindsay
Lindsay Appleby CMG (he/him) | UK Ambassador to the EU
Mobile: 
Private Office contact: 
UKMis Brussels | Av. D’ Auderghem 10 | Brussels | 1040
UK Mission to the EU: Website | Twitter | Press Team | Instagram
